'''鈭歯-ng-y''' ('''nangaya''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:immunodeplete|immunodeplete]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-ng-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:immunodeplete|immunodeplete]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯-ng-y
|-
! Lemma
| nangaya
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nangayithi|nangayithi]] || [[word:nangayiji|nangayiji]] || [[word:nangayishi|nangayishi]] || [[word:nangayi|nangayi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nangayuthuth|nangayuthuth]] || [[word:nangayujuj|nangayujuj]] || [[word:nangayushush|nangayushush]] || [[word:nangay|nangay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nangayuthu|nangayuthu]] || [[word:nangayuju|nangayuju]] || [[word:nangayushu|nangayushu]] || [[word:nangayu|nangayu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nangayufuth|nangayufuth]] || [[word:nangayufuj|nangayufuj]] || [[word:nangayufush|nangayufush]] || [[word:nangayuf|nangayuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nangayethe|nangayethe]] || [[word:nangayeje|nangayeje]] || [[word:nangayeshe|nangayeshe]] || [[word:nangaye|nangaye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nangayothoth|nangayothoth]] || [[word:nangayojoj|nangayojoj]] || [[word:nangayoshosh|nangayoshosh]] || [[word:nangay|nangay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nangayotho|nangayotho]] || [[word:nangayojo|nangayojo]] || [[word:nangayosho|nangayosho]] || [[word:nangayo|nangayo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nangayofoth|nangayofoth]] || [[word:nangayofoj|nangayofoj]] || [[word:nangayofosh|nangayofosh]] || [[word:nangayof|nangayof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nangay忙th忙|nangay忙th忙]] || [[word:nangay忙j忙|nangay忙j忙]] || [[word:nangay忙sh忙|nangay忙sh忙]] || [[word:nangay忙|nangay忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nangayathath|nangayathath]] || [[word:nangayajaj|nangayajaj]] || [[word:nangayashash|nangayashash]] || [[word:nangay|nangay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nangayatha|nangayatha]] || [[word:nangayaja|nangayaja]] || [[word:nangayasha|nangayasha]] || [[word:nangaya|nangaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nangayafath|nangayafath]] || [[word:nangayafaj|nangayafaj]] || [[word:nangayafash|nangayafash]] || [[word:nangayaf|nangayaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:nangayasha|nangayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gonangayasha|gonangayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokinangayasha|gokinangayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:nangayn眉sha|nangayn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gonangaynkn眉sha|gonangaynkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokinangayn眉sha|gokinangayn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nangaysh毛sha|nangaysh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonangaynksh毛sha|gonangaynksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinangaysh毛sha|gokinangaysh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nangayrosha|nangayrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonangaynkrosha|gonangaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinangayrosha|gokinangayrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nangaymusha|nangaymusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gonangaynkmusha|gonangaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinangaymusha|gokinangaymusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:nangaysherasha|nangaysherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gonangaynksherasha|gonangaynksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokinangaysherasha|gokinangaysherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:nangayngasha|nangayngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gonangaynkngasha|gonangaynkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokinangayngasha|gokinangayngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nangayasha|nangayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gonangaynkyasha|gonangaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokinangayasha|gokinangayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:nangayamasha|nangayamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gonangaynkyamasha|gonangaynkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokinangayamasha|gokinangayamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:nangayn眉sh毛sha|nangayn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonangaynkn眉sh毛sha|gonangaynkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinangayn眉sh毛sha|gokinangayn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nangayn眉rosha|nangayn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonangaynkn眉rosha|gonangaynkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinangayn眉rosha|gokinangayn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nangayn眉musha|nangayn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonangaynkn眉musha|gonangaynkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinangayn眉musha|gokinangayn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:nangaysh毛n眉sha|nangaysh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonangaynksh毛n眉sha|gonangaynksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinangaysh毛n眉sha|gokinangaysh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nangaysh毛rosha|nangaysh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonangaynksh毛rosha|gonangaynksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinangaysh毛rosha|gokinangaysh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nangaysh毛musha|nangaysh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonangaynksh毛musha|gonangaynksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinangaysh毛musha|gokinangaysh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:nangayron眉sha|nangayron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonangaynkron眉sha|gonangaynkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinangayron眉sha|gokinangayron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:nangayrosh毛sha|nangayrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonangaynkrosh毛sha|gonangaynkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinangayrosh毛sha|gokinangayrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nangayromusha|nangayromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonangaynkromusha|gonangaynkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinangayromusha|gokinangayromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:nangaymun眉sha|nangaymun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonangaynkmun眉sha|gonangaynkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinangaymun眉sha|gokinangaymun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:nangaymush毛sha|nangaymush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonangaynkmush毛sha|gonangaynkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinangaymush毛sha|gokinangaymush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nangaymurosha|nangaymurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonangaynkmurosha|gonangaynkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinangaymurosha|gokinangaymurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:nangay|nangay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n忙ng忙y|n忙ng忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:honangay|honangay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hon忙ng忙y|hon忙ng忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohonangay|hohonangay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohon忙ng忙y|hohon忙ng忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉nangay|n眉nangay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉n忙ng忙y|n眉n忙ng忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉nangay|n眉n眉nangay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉n忙ng忙y|n眉n眉n忙ng忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂nangay|n茂nangay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂n忙ng忙y|n茂n忙ng忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂nangay|n茂n茂nangay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂n忙ng忙y|n茂n茂n忙ng忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lunangay|lunangay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lun忙ng忙y|lun忙ng忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulunangay|lulunangay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulun忙ng忙y|lulun忙ng忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:linangay|linangay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lin忙ng忙y|lin忙ng忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilinangay|lilinangay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilin忙ng忙y|lilin忙ng忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:konangay|konangay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kon忙ng忙y|kon忙ng忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokonangay|kokonangay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokon忙ng忙y|kokon忙ng忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kenangay|kenangay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ken忙ng忙y|ken忙ng忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekenangay|kekenangay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keken忙ng忙y|keken忙ng忙y]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
